ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the cities table */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the property_types table */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property in millions */,
  "n_floors" INTEGER /* Number of floors in the property */,
  "n_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "surface_m2" REAL /* Surface area of the property in square meters */,
  "n_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "n_garages" INTEGER /* Number of garages in the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the properties table */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the cities table */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in the city */,
  "average_surface_m2" REAL /* Average surface area of properties in square meters */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded trends */,
  "num_listings" INTEGER /* Number of listings considered for the average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the properties table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "listing_status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, sold, rented) */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the listing will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the property_listings table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date the inquiry was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message from the user making the inquiry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the properties table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)
